title: Jinsoku — Self-hosted DFIR Workbench
description: Final-year project: full-stack DFIR platform wrapping Hayabusa and Takajo with 11 investigation tabs. Features MITRE ATT&CK matrix, IOC enrichment (VirusTotal / AbuseIPDB / GeoIP), Sysmon process tree, PDF and HTML reporting, and JWT-based RBAC. CI covers 125 pytest tests, mypy, ruff, ESLint, and a Docker build.

title: AD-Playground — Vulnerable Active Directory Lab
description: Single PowerShell script provisioning a vulnerable AD domain (44 users, OUs, groups) with 31 technique labs across enumeration, credential attacks, ACL abuse, delegation, lateral movement and persistence — plus 7 chained attack scenarios for end-to-end red team training and intern mentoring.

title: Chainsaw Automator — Threat Hunting CLI
description: Python tool automating WithSecure's Chainsaw for bulk Windows Event Log analysis. Performs multi-EventID searches, logon-type mapping and statistical summaries, then writes structured CSV and TXT forensic reports for analyst review.

title: Rocky Linux OS Hardening & Penetration Testing
description: Full OS hardening on Rocky Linux 9 — PAM policies, Firewalld, service disablement, Lynis and Rkhunter — validated via dual-VM comparative testing with Nmap NSE and Metasploit before and after hardening.

title: Web & Email Server Hardening (Apache, Postfix, Dovecot)
description: Configured and hardened Apache, Postfix and Dovecot with SSL/TLS, then validated the deployment using offensive tooling and Wireshark packet analysis.

title: SIEM Lab — Home SOC Build
description: Home SOC lab built on the Elastic Stack: centralised logging, endpoint monitoring and detection engineering against simulated attacks for blue-team practice.

title: Packet Sniffer (Python CLI)
description: Command-line packet capture and analysis tool built with Scapy — used to reinforce network protocol fundamentals and build a base for later traffic-analysis tooling.

title: KeystrokeTracker (Educational Keylogger)
description: Python keylogger built for cybersecurity learning and forensic analysis — explores persistence and data-capture techniques with an emphasis on defensive awareness.
